description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly black body accented by mint green and muted red components. The dual-barrel configuration is clearly visible, with both barrels running parallel and encased in a rectangular housing. The stock is angular and compact, finished in mint green, and the grip is ergonomic with a pronounced trigger guard. The upper receiver includes a sighting mechanism, and the fore-end is reinforced with ribbed detailing for added grip. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, giving it a modern tactical appearance.
description: A futuristic, dual-barrel shotgun with a black, mint green, and muted red color scheme, featuring an angular stock and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, dual barrels, angular mint green stock, and detailed grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the symmetrical, rectangular housing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the dual barrels, grip, and the mint green stock from a mirrored perspective.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the angular stock and the sighting mechanism atop the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length and encased in a rectangular housing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
